news.title:
India Ratings affirmed Trident Ltd's proposed NCDs rating at 'IND AA' with a stable outlook.
Trident's financial performance shows resilience with stable EBITDA, reduced debt, and strong credit metrics.
news.summary:
India Ratings affirmed Trident Ltd's proposed NCDs rating at 'IND AA' with a stable outlook.
Trident's financial performance shows resilience with stable EBITDA, reduced debt, and strong credit metrics.

news.title:
Trident Ltd informed BSE it is unaware of any significant or price-sensitive events.
The company emphasized compliance with SEBI regulations and timely disclosures.
news.summary:
Trident Ltd informed BSE it is unaware of any significant or price-sensitive events.
The company emphasized compliance with SEBI regulations and timely disclosures.

news.title:
Trident's Q3 FY25 standalone net sales fell 5.8% YoY to Rs. 1,565.8 crore.
Net profit dropped 45.8% to Rs. 42.3 crore; EBITDA declined 30.8% YoY.
news.summary:
Trident's Q3 FY25 standalone net sales fell 5.8% YoY to Rs. 1,565.8 crore.
Net profit dropped 45.8% to Rs. 42.3 crore; EBITDA declined 30.8% YoY.

news.title:
Trident Ltd responded to BSE about increased trading volume, citing no significant price-sensitive information.
The company stated its share price is market-driven and adheres to SEBI disclosure norms.
news.summary:
Trident Ltd responded to BSE about increased trading volume, citing no significant price-sensitive information.
The company stated its share price is market-driven and adheres to SEBI disclosure norms.

news.title:
Trident's EBITDA fell 36.5%, margin at 8.7% vs 12.9% YoY.
Neuland Labs, PNC Infra, Texmaco Rail, Vadilal saw profit and margin declines YoY.
news.summary:
Trident's EBITDA fell 36.5%, margin at 8.7% vs 12.9% YoY.
Neuland Labs, PNC Infra, Texmaco Rail, Vadilal saw profit and margin declines YoY.

news.title:
Trident Ltd forms TGIL, a wholly-owned subsidiary for overseas branding.
The company disinvested its entire stake in MYTRIDENT.COM for INR 1 lakh.
news.summary:
Trident Ltd forms TGIL, a wholly-owned subsidiary for overseas branding.
The company disinvested its entire stake in MYTRIDENT.COM for INR 1 lakh.

news.title:
Trident Ltd reported standalone Q3 net profit of INR 423M, 9M at INR 2,740M.
Consolidated Q3 profit stood at INR 442M. New subsidiary targets US market; MYTRIDENT.COM stake disposed.
news.summary:
Trident Ltd reported standalone Q3 net profit of INR 423M, 9M at INR 2,740M.
Consolidated Q3 profit stood at INR 442M. New subsidiary targets US market; MYTRIDENT.COM stake disposed.

news.title: Trident reported Q3 revenue of 15.7B INR, down from 16.67B INR YoY.
news.summary: Trident reported Q3 revenue of 15.7B INR, down from 16.67B INR YoY.

news.title:
Textile stocks like Gokaldas, Welspun, Vardhman, and Trident in focus ahead of Budget 2026 for potential policy support.
Sector seeks measures to boost competitiveness, protect MSME jobs, and leverage FTAs with EU and UK for export growth.
news.summary:
Textile stocks like Gokaldas, Welspun, Vardhman, and Trident in focus ahead of Budget 2026 for potential policy support.
Sector seeks measures to boost competitiveness, protect MSME jobs, and leverage FTAs with EU and UK for export growth.

news.title:
Trident Ltd's board meeting on Feb 9, 2026, will review unaudited financial results for Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window reopens on Feb 12, 2026, per SEBI insider trading guidelines.
news.summary:
Trident Ltd's board meeting on Feb 9, 2026, will review unaudited financial results for Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window reopens on Feb 12, 2026, per SEBI insider trading guidelines.

news.title: Trident accelerates European home textiles growth via strategic investments and new collections.
news.summary: Trident accelerates European home textiles growth via strategic investments and new collections.

news.title:
Trident Ltd acquires 100% stake in MYTRIDENT.COM Ltd to form a wholly-owned subsidiary.
The subsidiary aims to focus on global branding and U.S. marketing with INR 1L payment.
news.summary:
Trident Ltd acquires 100% stake in MYTRIDENT.COM Ltd to form a wholly-owned subsidiary.
The subsidiary aims to focus on global branding and U.S. marketing with INR 1L payment.

news.title:
Trident Ltd announces resignation of Group CFO, Mr. Rahul Roongta, effective January 2, 2026.
Resignation attributed to personal reasons; relieving formalities to be completed by the specified date.
news.summary:
Trident Ltd announces resignation of Group CFO, Mr. Rahul Roongta, effective January 2, 2026.
Resignation attributed to personal reasons; relieving formalities to be completed by the specified date.

news.title:
Trident plans ₹2,000 Cr Punjab expansion, ₹1,500 Cr for towel production, paper modernization.
₹500 Cr earmarked for corporate office, training center; 2,000 rural women jobs anticipated.
news.summary:
Trident plans ₹2,000 Cr Punjab expansion, ₹1,500 Cr for towel production, paper modernization.
₹500 Cr earmarked for corporate office, training center; 2,000 rural women jobs anticipated.

news.title:
Trident plans 20% capacity boost in towels, linens to meet export demand.
Focus on renewable energy, hygiene products, targeting mid-teen CAGR with margin gains.
news.summary:
Trident plans 20% capacity boost in towels, linens to meet export demand.
Focus on renewable energy, hygiene products, targeting mid-teen CAGR with margin gains.

news.title:
Trident Ltd released its Q2 FY26 investor presentation, detailing financial results till Sep 30, 2025.
Key segments include Yarn, Bed & Bath Linen, Paper, Chemicals, and Energy, with focus on strategy and trends.
news.summary:
Trident Ltd released its Q2 FY26 investor presentation, detailing financial results till Sep 30, 2025.
Key segments include Yarn, Bed & Bath Linen, Paper, Chemicals, and Energy, with focus on strategy and trends.

news.title:
Trident Ltd released its Q2 FY26 investor presentation, highlighting revenue of INR 18,032 mn with 52% generated from exports.
The Indian home textile market, valued at USD 10.38 bn in 2025, is projected to grow at 8.3% CAGR to USD 15.47 bn by 2030.
news.summary:
Trident Ltd released its Q2 FY26 investor presentation, highlighting revenue of INR 18,032 mn with 52% generated from exports.
The Indian home textile market, valued at USD 10.38 bn in 2025, is projected to grow at 8.3% CAGR to USD 15.47 bn by 2030.

news.title:
Trident's Q2 EBITDA fell to ₹2.14B from ₹2.2B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 11.98% from 13.21% YoY.
news.summary:
Trident's Q2 EBITDA fell to ₹2.14B from ₹2.2B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 11.98% from 13.21% YoY.

news.title:
Asian Paints, BSE, Trident among top gainers as market rose Nov 12.
Exit polls favoring NDA in Bihar drove key indices higher for 3rd session.
news.summary:
Asian Paints, BSE, Trident among top gainers as market rose Nov 12.
Exit polls favoring NDA in Bihar drove key indices higher for 3rd session.

news.title:
Trident Ltd's board meeting for Q2 and H1 FY2025 results is rescheduled to Nov 13, 2025.
Trading window remains closed, reopening on Nov 16, 2025 per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Trident Ltd's board meeting for Q2 and H1 FY2025 results is rescheduled to Nov 13, 2025.
Trading window remains closed, reopening on Nov 16, 2025 per SEBI regulations.
